mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalPatient, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.patient_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inHospital, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.patient_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS homeFollow, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.risk_level = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS highRisk FROM patient_info p WHERE p.is_deleted = 0

SELECT p.patient_id AS patientId, p.patient_name AS patientName, p.gender AS gender, CASE p.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS genderText, p.birth_date AS birthDate, p.age AS age, p.id_card AS idCard, p.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, p.ward_id AS wardId, w.ward_name AS wardName, p.bed_id AS bedId, b.bed_no AS bedNo, p.device_id AS deviceId, p.phone AS phone, p.admission_time AS admissionTime, p.discharge_time AS dischargeTime, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis, p.risk_level AS riskLevel, CASE p.risk_level WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '中高危' WHEN 4 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS riskLevelText, p.patient_type AS patientType, p.patient_status AS patientStatus, CASE p.patient_status WHEN 1 THEN '住院中' WHEN 2 THEN '出院' WHEN 3 THEN '居家随访' ELSE '未知' END AS patientStatusText, p.follow_up_status AS followUpStatus, p.ecg_count AS ecgCount, p.latest_ecg_time AS latestEcgTime FROM patient_info p LEFT JOIN sys_ward w ON p.ward_id = w.ward_id AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_bed b ON p.bed_id = b.bed_id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.patient_id = #{patientId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.record_id AS recordId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.collection_start_time AS collectionStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectionEndTime, c.ai_analysis_status AS aiAnalysisStatus, CASE c.ai_analysis_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '分析中' WHEN 2 THEN '已分析' WHEN 3 THEN '失败' ELSE '未知' END AS aiAnalysisStatusText, c.report_status AS reportStatus, CASE c.report_status WHEN 0 THEN '未生成' WHEN 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '驳回' ELSE '未知' END AS reportStatusText, c.display_status AS displayStatus, CASE c.display_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '已分析' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '采集失败' ELSE '未知' END AS displayStatusText, c.ai_conclusion_short AS aiConclusionShort FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.patient_id = #{patientId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.collection_start_time DESC, c.record_id DESC

SELECT w.warning_id AS warningId, w.warning_time AS warningTime, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.warning_level AS warningLevel, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS warningLevelText, w.warning_desc AS warningDesc, w.handle_status AS handleStatus, CASE w.handle_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '已处理' WHEN 4 THEN '已忽略' ELSE '未知' END AS handleStatusText, w.handle_user_name AS handleUserName, w.handle_time AS handleTime, w.handle_opinion AS handleOpinion FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.patient_id = #{patientId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY w.warning_time DESC, w.warning_id DESC

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.report_no AS reportNo, r.record_id AS recordId, r.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, r.report_create_time AS reportCreateTime, r.report_status AS reportStatus, CASE r.report_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN 2 THEN '审核通过' WHEN 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '已作废' ELSE '未知' END AS reportStatusText, r.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, r.doctor_diagnosis AS doctorDiagnosis, r.doctor_suggestion AS doctorSuggestion, r.report_create_doctor_name AS reportCreateDoctorName, r.audit_doctor_name AS auditDoctorName, r.audit_time AS auditTime, r.audit_opinion AS auditOpinion, a.abnormal_level AS abnormalLevel, CASE a.abnormal_level WHEN 0 THEN '正常' WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS abnormalLevelText, a.confidence AS aiConfidence FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON r.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.report_create_time DESC, r.report_id DESC
SELECT CAST(w.ward_id AS CHAR) AS value, w.ward_name AS label FROM sys_ward w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.status = 1 ORDER BY w.sort_num ASC, w.ward_id ASC
